response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, exposure to agentic workflows via MCP tooling, and a track record in distributed systems and open-source architecture, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, or leadership scaling engineering teams beyond 10 people — key requirements for this CTO role.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Proven expertise in event-driven, distributed systems (e.g., GISCollective, DLang microservices)
Strong engineering culture contributions (TDD, CI/CD, workshops, open-source leadership)
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams from 10+ to 30+ or developing senior technical leadership layers
No mention of real-time credit risk, working-capital algorithms, or financial compliance infrastructure
